name: complete-the-delivery
triggers: The request contains an enumerated or bulleted list of parts
Multiple deliverables are chained in prose: and also, as well as, both, all of, each of, plus
The request specifies an exact count of items, such as 3 examples or 5 tests
A part of the request has no corresponding element in the draft
The draft defers requested work (as an exercise, later, TODO, follow-up) without the user asking for deferral
counterindications: The request has exactly one deliverable and no format or count directives
The user explicitly dropped parts mid-task; the latest statement supersedes
